weak_aliases.reason: The ACE dataset dictionary encodes SBS (Select Bus Service) routes with a '+' suffix as a data-convention shorthand; 'S79+' is the internal code for 'S79-SBS'.

suggested_rules: In ACE dataset dictionaries, a '+' suffix (e.g., S79+) is the dataset's internal coded representation of an SBS variant (e.g., S79-SBS). These should be merged when the base route matches and the '+' variant corresponds to the SBS variant of the same physical route.
suggestion.rationale: The ACE routes dataset dictionary uses '+' as a coding convention for SBS (Select Bus Service) routes. The top values ('M14+', 'M34+', 'M86+', 'B44+', 'BX12+', 'Q44+', 'B46+', 'BX41+', 'S79+') correspond one-to-one with SBS routes listed in the bus lane camera report ('M14-SBS', 'M34-SBS', 'M86-SBS', 'B44-SBS', 'BX12-SBS', 'Q44-SBS', 'B46-SBS', 'BX41-SBS', 'S79-SBS'). The ACE Program field confirms this dataset covers ACE camera enforcement routes. 'S79+' is unambiguously the ACE dataset's internal code for the S79-SBS route. 'route_able-s79-sbs' documents the same physical route (borough: Staten Island, streets: Hylan Blvd/Richmond Av) under the S79-SBS designation. They should be merged as the same canonical identity.
